text_block_list.text: After a day out...
choice_data_list: This time I'll make sure you have fun!
This time I'll make sure you have fun!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...Sigh.
Look, I didn't have any fun the lasttime you tried to play a game with me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Stop with the kiddy games. It's not<n>gonna happen.

Sure—last time ended in failure—but<n>today, I have
an ace up my sleeve. I<n>know all about the game
she's been<n>obsessed with recently.

RDLI is a PvP FPS developed<n>overseas. What
makes it fun is the<n>wide arsenal of weapons
players can<n>use to outwit their opponents.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I thought I was the only one around<n>here who
plays it...

I heard from Super Creek that Narita<n>Taishin's
been grumbling about not<n>having anyone to play
with.

I stand little chance of beating an<n>experienced
player like her, but she'll<n>probably enjoy it if I put
up a good<n>enough fight.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Fine. I accept your challenge.

I'm a little unsettled by how readily<n>she accepts
my offer, but I charge<n>into battle nevertheless,
ready to give<n>the fight of my life.
YOU LOSE.
That's another win for me. I'm five<n>for five now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Yeah? I mean, I do play a lot.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, you had a lot of nerve<n>challenging me
despite being trash at<n>the game.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You choose terrible weapons and<n>stages, and you
suck at using the<n>NPCs. Did you even change the
settings to match your play style?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
This is my first time playing PvP<n>mode, so I was
looking forward to it,<n>but playing against you is
disappointing as hell.

Narita Taishin is rarely this chatty. She<n>seems to
be in a good mood now that<n>she's found
someone to wipe the<n>floor with.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's no fun like this... Want me to<n>make things
easier for you?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Wow, no hesitation. Don't you have<n>any pride?
choice_data_list: I just want to keep hanging out with you.

text_block_list.text: Huh?

If I keep losing so easily, she's going<n>to get
bored. I'll gladly throw away<n>my pride to give her
a better match.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Do you hear yourself? You are<n>seriously have no
shame at all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'll only use the default weapons, and<n>you can
borrow one of my SSRs. If<n>you still can't win, then
you're a lost<n>cause.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph, whatever.
YOU LOSE.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I knew you couldn't do it.

Even after countless rematches, I<n>just can't win
against her. I try to<n>apologize for being a terrible
partner,<n>but she cuts me off.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: It's fine. We can play again some<n>other time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The rewards they give out for winning<n>PvP
matches are pretty good. Plus,<n>crushing you is
kinda fun.

Her words are harsh, but at least<n>she's giving me
a chance.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hmm? You really think you can beat<n>me without
any boosts?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Then you should just ask for a<n>handicap. It'll
even the playing field.
choice_data_list:
This game is super fun, so I want to try winning by
myself.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I thought you were gonna complain<n>about being
bad at strategizing, not<n>getting the controls, or that
the<n>game's too violent and scary.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: If you say so. Give me your best.
She seems to be in an even better<n>mood, but...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: Uh... What does this item do again?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugggh! Stop!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I'm getting ticked off just watching<n>you play! You
should use that item<n>you got earlier and...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
See? Now you get more health back.<n>Restoration
items are vital to winning.
choice_data_list: I see now! You're incredible, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...This is, like, the most basic of basic<n>knowledge.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Whatever. Agh, look at the time! I've<n>wasted the
whole day with you!
choice_data_list: Thanks for teaching me so much, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I don't need your thanks! I'm<n>leaving!

She leaves in a huff, but I'm glad I<n>got to play so
many rounds against<n>her.
